metadata.name: Mobile Troubleshooting - New Phone Not Activating

description: A customer received a new phone but it's stuck on the activation screen.

nodes.task_description: Get the IMEI of the new phone and the ICCID of the new SIM card from the customer.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly collects the device and SIM identifiers.

nodes.task_description: Check the activation system to see the status of the IMEI/ICCID pair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the activation is 'pending' due to a mismatch.

nodes.task_description: Manually push the activation for the correct device and SIM pair.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uses the manual activation tool to resolve the issue.
